title: Replaceability matrix
outcome: Replaceability matrix implemented as a pure projection of the manifest (no duplicated data). New lib helper panoply_role_matrix derives, for each swappable role (a module-default tool with a non-empty alternatives list), the ACTIVE member = installed default, else first installed alternative, else the missing default. `panoply list --matrix` prints the matrix; `panoply doctor` prints a 'replaceability' section and emits a roles[] array in the registry JSON (schema extended, optional). On this host all 6 roles (git, nav, session, secrets, tools, js) resolve to their installed default. External alternative ids (asdf, npm, yarn) are reported as informational notes by validate-substrate. Docs: native-toolchain.md gained a 'Replaceability matrix' section.
validation: GATE bin/validate-substrate.sh PASS 6/6 (manifest 44 tools; brewfile --check clean; doctor --json valid + rail enforced; env resolved + --json + --shell; agent module + rtk guards; matrix resolves active per role). `moon run panoply:gen-check panoply:validate-substrate` both PASS. Regression: panoply doctor exit 0 (rail ENFORCED), validate-secrets PASS, validate-dotfiles PASS, validate.sh PASS. shellcheck --severity=warning CLEAN.
decisions: matrix is a projection over (default, alternatives) per tool — no [[module]] duplication, so it cannot drift from the tool data
a swappable role is anchored on the module-default tool that carries alternatives (avoids double-listing when an alt lists back); rust/agent/etc. with no alternatives are not roles
external alternatives (asdf/npm/yarn) are warned-not-failed so the matrix stays honest about runtimes that live outside the manifest
epic_status: E03 COMPLETE: S1-S5 done. Manifest is the derivation source (panoply gen brewfile|mise; --check gate); doctor --json + missing-defaults recap; panoply env resolved/--shell/--json; bootstrap human-only (exit 13); RTK wired as recommended-default swappable compressor (agent module, rtk.zsh routing, profile rtk flag, rtk gain baseline 44.8%); replaceability matrix reported by doctor + panoply list --matrix. Gate panoply:validate-substrate 6/6 PASS. DEFERRED (human): S3 `panoply bootstrap` install -> 0 missing defaults.
token_note: loaded 1 story block + 1 canon ref (§8.2) + STATE/ledger tail; matrix/roles are compact structured reads for the runtime controller (Cthulhu) to route on
